passport.name: Passport Seva
passport.description: Official travel document and identity proof issued by Government of India

steps.title: Register
steps.description: Create an account on the official Passport Seva portal

steps.title: Fill Form
steps.description: Complete the online application Form 1

steps.title: Payment
steps.description: Pay the application fee and schedule appointment

steps.title: Appointment
steps.description: Visit the selected Passport Seva Kendra (PSK) for biometric capture and verification

tips: Carry all original documents along with 2 photocopies
Reach 15 minutes prior to your slot time
warnings: Do not trust middle-men or unofficial websites charging extra fees

commonIssues.solution: Get a gazetted officer affidavit or update Aadhaar details first before scheduling.

aadhar.name: UIDAI (MyAadhaar)
aadhar.description: 12-digit unique identity number and profile database issued by UIDAI

steps.title: Locate Center
steps.description: Find nearest permanent Aadhaar Enrollment Centre

steps.title: Visit Center
steps.description: Submit form, get fingerprinted, scan iris, and take photo

steps.title: Verification
steps.description: Wait for backend verification and card dispatch

aadhar.fees: Free for first enrollment, ₹50-100 for biometric updates
tips: Ensure your mobile number is correctly linked during registration
warnings: Never share your Aadhaar OTP with anyone

commonIssues.solution: Use the EID (Enrollment ID) printed on the slip to trace progress on the portal.

voter.name: National Voters' Service Portal (NVSP)
voter.description: Register to vote, change addresses, or download digital voter ID cards (e-EPIC)

steps.title: Register Online
steps.description: Fill out Form 6 on NVSP portal for new voter registration

steps.title: Field Verification
steps.description: Booth Level Officer (BLO) will visit your house for physical check

steps.title: EPIC Card Download
steps.description: Download e-EPIC from the portal once approved

tips: Verify if your name is in the electoral roll using search function on the site
warnings: Providing false information is punishable under Representation of the People Act

commonIssues.solution: Download the e-EPIC PDF online which is equally valid.

services_india.name: National Government Services Portal
services_india.description: Massive centralized directory linking to over 13,000 state and central government services

steps.title: Search Service
steps.description: Enter search term or filter by state/ministry

steps.title: Redirect
steps.description: Get routed to the official departmental webpage

tips: Use search tags for narrow results
warnings: Make sure the URL redirects to a .gov.in domain

digilocker.name: DigiLocker
digilocker.description: Official cloud-based document wallet to fetch, store, and verify government-issued cards

steps.title: Sign Up
steps.description: Register with mobile and enter your Aadhaar details

steps.title: Fetch Documents
steps.description: Select issuer (e.g. CBSE, Income Tax) and fetch certificates

tips: DigiLocker documents are legally equivalent to originals under IT Act 2000

commonIssues.solution: Your name in DigiLocker must match the name on the document exactly. Update details first.

umang.name: UMANG Portal
umang.description: Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance to access multiple state & central services

steps.title: Register
steps.description: Create account using mobile verification

steps.title: Link Aadhaar
steps.description: Integrate Aadhaar for full service coverage

steps.title: Access Services
steps.description: Search PF balance, file pension details, check scholarships

tips: Excellent for checking EPF status on the go

it_efiling.name: Income Tax e-Filing Portal
it_efiling.description: Generate instant e-PAN, file Income Tax Returns (ITR), and verify PAN card details

steps.title: Register/Login
steps.description: Login using your PAN as username

steps.title: Prepare Return
steps.description: Fill out ITR parameters or download pre-filled data

steps.title: e-Verify
steps.description: Confirm returns using Aadhaar OTP authentication

tips: Use Aadhaar e-verification for instant receipt processing without mailing physical papers
warnings: Always file returns before the standard deadline to avoid high late fees

gst.name: GST Portal
gst.description: Tax registry and compliance database for Goods and Services Tax in India

steps.title: Apply for TRN
steps.description: Fill out Part-A of registration to get Temporary Reference Number

steps.title: Complete Form
steps.description: Submit business information and upload documents in Part-B

steps.title: Verification
steps.description: Wait for GST officer approval and registration certificate generation

tips: Keep scan copies of bank statements and rent agreements ready before filing
warnings: Failing to file quarterly returns can result in suspension of registration

nsdl_tin.name: NSDL / UTIITSL Tin Portal
nsdl_tin.description: Official platforms to request a new physical PAN Card or issue database corrections

steps.title: Select Form
steps.description: Select Form 49A for citizens or changes/corrections form

steps.title: Payment
steps.description: Pay card processing fees

steps.title: Upload Docs
steps.description: Complete e-Sign using Aadhaar OTP, or post documents to NSDL office

tips: Use Aadhaar e-KYC option for card processing without mailing documents
warnings: Filing duplicate PAN card applications is illegal

parivahan.name: Parivahan Sewa
parivahan.description: Comprehensive portal for vehicle registration (RC), driving license (DL), tax payment, and challans

steps.title: Select Service
steps.description: Choose vehicle registration or licensing service page

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.description: Input vehicle number, frame number, or driving license records

steps.title: Submit & Pay
steps.description: Pay challan, registration fees, or tax online

parivahan.estimatedTime: Immediate for records/tax, varies for license
parivahan.fees: Varies by state and service category
parivahan.processType: Online + State RTO Visit (for physical tests)
parivahan.officeVisitTiming: For vehicle inspection or driving tests
tips: Always check for pending traffic challans periodically
warnings: Official site ends with .gov.in. Be cautious of duplicates.

commonIssues.issue: Challan paid but still showing active
commonIssues.solution: Check payment history tab on portal and trigger transaction sync.

nad.name: National Academic Depository (NAD)
nad.description: Official online storage for academic awards, degrees, certificates, and college transcripts

steps.title: Register
steps.description: Create user account linking Aadhaar and academic history

steps.title: Fetch Records
steps.description: Select university or board and enter roll number to pull degrees

tips: Use NAD to quickly share verified degree copies with foreign universities or job portals

affidavit_builder.name: Online Agreement / Affidavit Builders
affidavit_builder.description: Draft customized agreements, affidavits, lease deeds, and rental documents

steps.title: Select Template
steps.description: Select Rent Agreement, General Affidavit, or Power of Attorney

steps.title: Fill Fields
steps.description: Input name, rent amounts, dates, and covenants

steps.title: Print/Stamp
steps.description: Get printed on Stamp Paper or download template draft

affidavit_builder.fees: Free template (Stamp duty extra if printed)
tips: Always check template with a notary or advocate before official signature
warnings: Affidavits must be sworn before a notary or oath commissioner to be valid in court

resume_builder.name: Resume/CV Builders
resume_builder.description: Build premium, professional, and ATS-friendly CV designs for job applications

steps.title: Select Design
steps.description: Select template matching industry standards

steps.title: Fill Sections
steps.description: Add career details, qualifications, and contacts

steps.title: Download
steps.description: Export output as a clean PDF

tips: Keep your resumes concise — 1 page is usually preferred

state_mh.name: Aaple Sarkar (Maharashtra)
state_mh.description: Official citizen service portal for the Government of Maharashtra

steps.title: Register Profile
steps.description: Create a Citizen login account using UID verification

steps.title: Select Certificate
steps.description: Select Domicile, Caste, or Income certificate application

steps.title: Upload Docs
steps.description: Upload scan records and pay service fees online

tips: Keep self-declaration forms printed, signed, and scanned before upload
warnings: Check official state web address ends with .gov.in or .mahaonline.gov.in

state_up.name: e-District UP (Uttar Pradesh)
state_up.description: Official Uttar Pradesh government services for birth, death, caste, and income certificates

steps.title: Citizen Login
steps.description: Register on the citizen portal 'e-Sathi'

steps.title: Submit Form
steps.description: Fill details for required certificate

steps.title: Lekhpal Visit
steps.description: Local administrative officer reviews information

tips: Get verified reports from your local Lekhpal for faster processing

state_ka.name: Seva Sindhu (Karnataka)
state_ka.description: Integrated portal providing access to various government departments in Karnataka

steps.title: Sign In
steps.description: Access system through Digilocker credentials or login registration

steps.title: Fill details
steps.description: Select specific department and fill out form parameters

tips: Track application status using mobile reference number on SMS

state_dl.name: e-District Delhi
state_dl.description: Government of NCT Delhi portal for Domicile, Caste, and Marriage Certificates
requiredDocuments: Address records in Delhi for 3+ years

steps.title: Verify Profile
steps.description: Register using Aadhaar or Voter ID record

steps.title: Select Service
steps.description: Fill up forms and upload scans

steps.title: Physical Visit
steps.description: Visit Sub-Divisional Magistrate (SDM) office with originals if ordered

state_dl.officeVisitTiming: When scheduled by SDM for marriage certificates or verification checks
tips: Ensure your documents match the name spelling on your school certificate

state_tn.name: tNeGA / TN e-Sevai (Tamil Nadu)
state_tn.description: Tamil Nadu e-Governance portal for certificates and utility applications

steps.title: Register CAN
steps.description: Register CAN (Citizen Access Number) to initialize portal access

steps.title: Choose Service
steps.description: Select certificates/revenue department services

steps.title: Payment
steps.description: Complete payment using netbanking/cards

tips: Always register CAN with active mobile number since all update warnings use CAN

dl.name: Driving License
dl.description: Legal license to drive vehicles in India

steps.title: Learner's License
steps.description: Apply and pass the test

steps.title: Driving Test
steps.description: Book a slot and pass the test at RTO

tips: Practice well before the test

pan.name: PAN Card
pan.description: Permanent Account Number for tax purposes

steps.title: Apply Online
steps.description: Fill Form 49A/49AA

steps.title: Verify
steps.description: Digital or Physical verification

tips: Use e-KYC for faster processing

steps.title: UAN Activation
steps.description: Activate your Universal Account Number

steps.title: Create ABHA
steps.description: Generate your digital health ID

steps.title: Apply at Portal
steps.description: Visit state-specific NFSA portal

income_certificate.name: Income Certificate
income_certificate.description: Proof of annual income for scholarships and subsidies

steps.title: Apply at e-District
steps.description: Visit your state's e-District portal

steps.title: Document Verification
steps.description: Verification by local Patwari / Tehsildar

income_certificate.officeVisitTiming: Visit to local Tehsil may be required
tips: Keep your employment or agriculture income details ready

birth_certificate.name: Birth Certificate
birth_certificate.description: Official record of birth for identity and age proof

steps.title: Hospital Registration
steps.description: If born in hospital, they usually register it

steps.title: Apply at Municipal Corp
steps.description: Or apply online at CRS portal within 21 days

birth_certificate.officeVisitTiming: Visit to Registrar office for collection
tips: Always register within 21 days to avoid complex late registration processes
warnings: Late registration requires an affidavit from a magistrate

eshram.name: E-Shram Card

steps.title: Self Registration
steps.description: Visit e-Shram portal and enter Aadhaar linked mobile

steps.title: Fill Details
steps.description: Enter occupation and bank details

steps.title: Download UAN Card
steps.description: Download your E-Shram Universal Account Number card

tips: Ensure your mobile is linked to your Aadhaar card before applying

ayushman.name: Ayushman Bharat Card
ayushman.description: Health coverage of up to ₹5 Lakhs per family per year

steps.title: Check Eligibility
steps.description: Login as beneficiary on the PMJAY portal

steps.title: e-KYC
steps.description: Verify identity using Aadhaar OTP or Biometric

steps.title: Approval & Download
steps.description: Wait for approval and download Ayushman card

tips: You can also visit a CSC center to get it done offline

udyam.name: Udyam Registration
udyam.description: MSME registration for small businesses and enterprises

steps.title: Register Online
steps.description: Visit Udyam portal and apply for new entrepreneur

steps.title: Aadhaar Verification
steps.description: Input Aadhaar and verify with OTP

steps.title: Business Details
steps.description: Enter PAN, investment, and turnover details

tips: Udyam registration is 100% free; beware of fake agencies charging fees
warnings: Fake portals look identical to the official one; always check for .gov.in
